calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Continued To Jul-11-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Edward Singer, Esq. for Plaintiff: Civic Properties DE, LLC.
Plaintiff's witness: Jeff Leibert; George Hawks and Mary Margaret Dempsey, were sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Brandon Eggleston and Defaulted Co-Defendant: Thomas Fairwell.
Exhibit 1 - Residential Tenancy Agreement ---------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-day notice-----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Proof of Service-----------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 400 Duboce St., #110, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $6,120.00
Costs $219.50, for a total of $6,339.50
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Jonathan Siegel, Esquire appearing for plaintiff. Tiela Chalmers, Esquire appearing as the limited scope attorney.

Defendant Brandon Eggleston failed to appear. Adam James, a friend of Mr. Eggleston, appeared. Court takes the matter off the settlement conference calendar. Jury demand is stricken. Matter to proceed as a court trial on July 11, 2005.

Sue Kaplan, Commissioner. G. Peerless, clk.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.

DEFENDANT BRANDON EGGLESTON'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is off calendar. First amneded complaint filed on 5/24/05. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558 (301/JLW)
